title: Os' Splash Text Challenges
description: This pack prompts you with a new challenge each time you open Minecraft's start screen. Challenges could be to build with a certain color, avoid a certain kind of food, a [block] is lava game, and more! Spice up your gaming session!
body:
[![FastClient Ad](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f1dc21fae33dabdbc4a6109168110e69b42bf6f7.png)](https://fastclient.net/Oslypsis)

# What Does This Pack Do?

This pack adds fun challenges (or adjectives depending on which version you choose) via the splash text for each gaming session. If you need to reroll, you can open your world and back out to the title screen to get a new challenge. You can choose to accumulate challenges for your world, too (if you get contradictory challenges, go with the most recent one). You can come up with a punishment for failing the challenges, like randomly scrolling through your hotbar and tossing whatever slot you land on into a cactus, for example. Or just stashing it until the next session if that's too much ;)

With the adjectives, you can use that adjective to define your playstyle for that session, or use it as the style/theme of build you make, like a prompt. There are over 100 challenges and over 400 adjectives!

Spice up your forever world or your 2 week phases!

<details>
<summary>List of all challenges</summary>
  
- No vegetables

- Only eat vegetables

- No meat

- Only eat meat

- No fruit

- Only eat fruit

- No cooked food

- Only eat cooked food

- No golden food or suspicious stew

- Only eat bowl food

- Only eat desserts

- No seafood

- Only eat seafood

- Only one food type per minecraft day, no duplicates

- No caving

- No mining below Y=50

- No mining below Y=0

- Mine only with TNT (enable tntExplosionDropDecay)

- No trading

- No armor

- No crafting armor

- No mending/reparing tools & gear

- No retrieving items upon death

- No sleeping

- No staying at a base

- Only build base at worldspawn

- Bases must be in the nether

- No enchantments

- No diamond/netherite tools

- No shields

- No redstone

- No elytra

- No placing torches

- No looting structures

- No game mechanic farming

- No overcrowding farm animals

- No confining villagers

- No sounds or subtitles

- Only use the hotbar (no inventory)

- No use of offhand

- No potions/bottles

- No breaking player placed blocks

- No natural regen

- No brightness

- No fleeing fights

- No fighting/violence

- No doors/gates/trapdoors

- No using storage blocks

- No enderchest

- No swords/axes as weapons

- No using nether portals

- No beacons

- No placing wooden blocks

- No placing stone/deepslate blocks

- Grass is lava!

- Water is lava!

- Dirt is lava!

- Stone is lava!

- Wood is lava!

- Deepslate is lava!

- Netherrack is lava!

- Collect all armor trims

- Collect all sherds

- Collect all edible items

- Collect all flowers

- Collect all glazed terracotta

- Collect all crops

- Kill one of every mob

- Build something with red

- Build something with orange

- Build something with yellow

- Build something with lime green

- Build something with green

- Build something with cyan

- Build something with light blue

- Build something with blue

- Build something with purple

- Build something with magenta

- Build something with pink

- Build something with brown

- Build something with white

- Build something with light gray

- Build something with dark gray

- Build something with black

- Add an accent color to a build

- Get a new pet and make a shelter for it

- Build a temple/church dedicated to a minecraft block

- Choose a side: sun or moon, and build its shrine

- Create a new banner design for something/someone

- Build a secret garden with a twist

- Build a treehouse with a twist

- Build a library with a twist

- Build a tall structure

- Build a bakery/butcher/restaurant

- Build a greenhouse with a twist

- Build a smeltery/blacksmith/forge

- Build a redstone labratory

- Build a cosmic observatory

- Build some decorative things

- Build a water based structure

- Build a lava based structure

- Build an underground structure

- Build a town hall/communal area

- Write lore for an item & put it in a bookshelf

- Write lore for a mob & put it in a bookshelf

- Create a new holiday and build something for it

</details>


![A splash text challenge to "only eat desserts"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/33cbc7be8ac25dfc8e43159954af583214d46755.png)

[![Get 25% off your first month with BisectHosting using promo code oslypsis](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/a68298ac-ecfb-4f1b-9057-5081d638948d.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/oslypsis)

# Usage Rights
Using/modifying for personal use is allowed.

Use (even if modified) for monetized videos must include a link in the description back to this page.

Please ask before using my content in your mods/packs/etc. Do not redistribute.

Using this pack as a template to make your own textures that work the same way in game as mine do is allowed and encouraged. Please note that I've changed some of the names of the files from their vanilla counterparts - you will need to keep these names when changing out the textures or the files will not be able to find the textures.
